h1: Stink Bug Control in NYC — Before They Settle In for Winter
heroParagraph: Brown marmorated stink bugs aggregate on sun-warmed exterior walls in late September and October, then squeeze through gaps into NYC homes and apartments for winter shelter. Once inside, they're largely dormant — but crushing or disturbing them releases their defensive odor. Our stink bug program focuses on fall exclusion and perimeter treatments before entry, the most effective intervention point.
